creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is mistyped ``judgement'' in the description of ``The FreeBSD core team''. It is in the last sentence that says ,,... these are the people who gave up their lives in favor of FreeBSD against their better judgment!''

Fix: 

Replace it with the word ``judgement'' (introduction/chapter.sgml, line 802).
How-To-Repeat: You can always see.
